title: Anthropic adds Ben Bernanke to its Long-Term Benefit Trust
friendlyTitle: Anthropic brings in an economic expert for AI governance
summary: Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust appointed former Federal Reserve chair Ben Bernanke as a trustee. Anthropic says Bernanke will advise on how advanced AI affects economies and workforces, while the independent trust helps appoint board members and guide long-term governance.
friendlySummary: Former Fed chair Ben Bernanke is joining Anthropic’s independent trust to advise on AI’s economic effects.
whyItMatters: Major AI labs are becoming economic institutions as much as software companies. Adding a crisis-tested economist to governance signals that workforce and macroeconomic effects are now core strategic issues, not side notes.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This shows big AI companies are paying more attention to how AI may change jobs, markets, and the wider economy.
